DTR  |  Listen to a Classroom Conversation
LCC-HS10-L1-300650-HSVPA910-CYP-API-01 • HS Visual and Performing Arts: Theatre 9–10 • Character Choices in Given Circumstances

The Path and the Voice

Click  🎧  to listen.
Listen to a conversation between a girl and a boy. Listen carefully. You will hear the conversation only once. After listening, you will answer some questions.
Listen to the Conversation
1QUESTION 1: What does the girl ask the boy to do?
2QUESTION 2: According to the girl, why does the pansori singer's voice change?
3QUESTION 3: Why does the boy think the pansori approach will help with their assignment?
Choose the best answer for each question. You may change your answers before submitting.
Answer all 3 questions to submit.
SMART SUPPORT:
Go back to the conversation. Listen again. Find the part where the girl talks about a singer.
CA ELD PI.A.1, PI.A.3, PI.B.5  |  CA Arts Standards: Theatre Pr4b (9–10)  |  HS Visual and Performing Arts: Theatre 9–10: Character Choices in Given Circumstances
